author: ABC News YouTube
text:
A JetBlue flight encountered a nearby plane not communicating with air traffic control
The FAA is investigating after a JetBlue flight approaching Fort Lauderdale on Monday encountered a nearby plane not communicating with air traffic control.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:

author: ABC News YouTube
text:

breaks down new research showing women taking GLP-1 medications were less likely to develop breast cancer and what it could mean for prevention.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Incumbent Karen Bass advances in closely-watched LA mayoral race & more trends | Searched
ABC News Live is breaking down the top stories trending today:
California election results: Where the gubernatorial and mayoral races stand now.
Former 'How I Met Your Mother' actor Nick Pasqual sentenced to 32 years to life for attempted murder. 
New Trump admin proposal would vet federal grants for 'American values."
Frontier Airlines passenger allegedly tried to breach cockpit, choke off-duty flight attendant. 
Starbucks confirms it's bringing back the viral Unicorn Frappuccino. 
 
Watch ‘Searched’ weeknights at 4:30 p.m. ET on @ABCNewsLive.
